title: Better Pause
description: Why pause screen if no pause smh
body:
[![][cf-shield]][cf-link]

**This simple mod just makes it so the pause menu doesn't come up when you unfocus the game if you're in a server.**

no yeah really that's it, i don't have a joke for this one

Available for Fabric and Neoforge 1.21.x

[cf-shield]: https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1484113?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=%23F16436
[cf-link]: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterpause
